item.description: These high-quality metal coins replace the cardboard coins contained in the 7 Wonders core game and the 7 Wonders: Leaders expansion.

comment.value:
Own 2 sets - 1 for trade
These high-quality metal coins replace the cardboard coins contained in the 7 Wonders core game, 7 Wonders: Leaders expansion and 7 Wonders: Armada
The official version from Repos Production contains as many of each coin as there are cardboard coins with values 1 and 3 in the core game and with the same number of value 6 as in the Leaders expansion:
– 46 x coins with value ‘1’ – 24 x coins with value ‘3’ – 17 x coins with value ‘6’
It also comes with a velvet bag inscribed with the ‘7 Wonders’ logo to store the coins in.
At some point in 2023. I picked up at least one set of these.

Placeholder. Bought 1,5,10 neutral coin set. It is good, but not superb. 10 coins feel too light. Value 240 (40x1, 20x 5, 10x10). Good for e.g. 7W, 7WD, Clank! and Istanbul The Dice Game. https://www.amazon.de/70-Spielm%C3%BCnzen-aus-Metall-Baumwollbeutel/dp/B07C6GXRFX/ref=sr_1_1?s=toys&ie=UTF8&qid=1531751198&sr=1-1&keywords=m%C3%BCnzen+ludoxl
Hangulatos, jó más játékhoz is. 87 darab, elég soknak számít a hasonlók közt.

I own one set of these, but actually the metal coins I use for 7 Wonders are not the officially sanctioned ones from Broken Token as depicted in this entry. I acquired mine from Amazon and Eagle-Gryphon Games) for $24 for 100 coins each and used these to upgrade the paper coins for 7 Wonders, 7 Wonders Duel and Peurto Rico. There is no more satisfying in game transaction than one paid with heavy weight, period authentic currency!

Eighty-seven (87) metal coins & one (1) drawstring bag.
This allows owners to upgrade from the cardboard coins in the 7 Wonders base game and the Leaders Expansion to metal coins.
Includes a cloth bag with the 7 Wonders logo on it.
This does not include replacement coins for the cardboard coins that came in the Babel and Armada expansions.
Outstanding accessory - if every game had accessories like this, I'd be broke.
Metal coins are always the best!
Best metal coins I've played with - great looking, thematic, hefty weight and nice feel

notes.value:
I still have way too many games - and there are new ones published every day. So I made some tough decisions and am parting this one. Never unpacked, still in shrink, as if I had bought it an hour ago. After I bought it, I put it away into a storage-box. I think it is time to give it into the good hands of either a collector or someone who is dying to play it. If you are interested, please feel free to send me a mail. I can send more pictures. Postage in Europe should be around 16 Euros, packed in a sturdy box, insured and tracked. To Great Britain it is 27 Euros, and the rest of the world it is usually around 48 Euros. And of course I will gladly combine shipping to save you money. Packaging is on me. Any customs payments or taxes in your country are on you. I am not a store and I don't do this for a living.
Keep safe and stay healthy Thanks,
Andreas
